summary: Completed testing of salon management app refactoring iteration 7. Backend: 12/12 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All features working - booking modal, step navigation, busy slots display, inline conflict panel with operator alternatives and time slots, lazy loading for admin pages. The major refactoring (BookingModal and ManageAppointments extraction from WebsitePage.jsx) is working correctly.

issues: Console warning: '<span> cannot be a child of <option>' in operator select dropdown - caused by Emergent visual editor wrapping, doesn't affect functionality
